case_title: DESAI, THAKOR B vs. MANCINI, WILLIAM

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DESAI, THAKOR B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANCINI, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 KEARNY ST 	8, ST PAUL HOTEL, LEASE FORFEITED
